tool_input.command: node audit.js > audit-output.json 2> audit-err.log; echo EXIT=$?; head -3 audit-err.log; echo '---'; wc -l audit-output.json
cd /c/Users/noahm/Project && git status

cd /c/Users/noahm/Project && git add bitlife-finance.html && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add 20-bank system with job-tailored insurance coverage

Each bank offers a bundled insurance package that reduces
costs on matching downsides (medical, auto, home, tech,
identity, legal, pet, fire). Banks charge a monthly fee,
pay a signup bonus, and add an APY bonus on high-yield
savings. Sector-matched banks surface first in the list
with a FIT star for the player's current job.

Bank update events (rate changes, loyalty bonuses, fraud
alerts, mergers, breaches) land in the inbox ~9%/month
while enrolled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

cd /c/Users/noahm/Project && git add bitlife-finance.html && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Employees now send morale check-ins to the inbox

Each hire gets a random name and a starting morale. Morale
drifts monthly based on business profitability, tenure, and
random events. Every employee has a ~12% monthly chance of
sending the player an inbox message â€” the tone scales with
morale (positive, steady, slipping, or critical) and mentions
specific workplace problems drawn from a 15-item catalog.

Low morale dampens the revenue boost multiplier, so ignoring
staff messages has real cost.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git -c http.version=HTTP/1.1 -c http.postBuffer=524288000 push origin master
tool_input.description: Commit and push employee messages feature

tool_input.command:
cd /c/Users/noahm/Project && git add bitlife-finance.html && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Preserve scroll position when buying/selling stocks and crypto

Buy/sell handlers previously re-rendered the entire grid by
re-calling showStockModal / showCryptoModal, which reset the
scroll position to the top. Replaced with in-place card
updates that refresh only the affected owned/meta/buttons +
cash display.

Cap inbox in addInboxItem instead of only in generateInboxItems
to prevent one-item overshoot when multiple emitters fire the
same month (found via stress test).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git -c http.version=HTTP/1.1 -c http.postBuffer=524288000 push origin master 2>&1 | tail -3
tool_input.description: Commit and push to main repo

tool_input.command:
cd "C:\Users\noahm\Project" && git add bitlife-finance.html && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
finlife: monthly expense event now offers 4 items to pick from

Previously showed a single forced item with Buy/Defer. Now rolls 4
distinct items each with their own rolled cost and gives Buy + Defer
per item plus a Pass option (9 choices total) so the player actually
chooses what to spend on.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
cd "C:\Users\noahm\Project\.playwright-cli" && node sponsor-test.js 2>&1 | tail -60

cd "C:\Users\noahm\Project" && git add bitlife-finance.html && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
finlife: sponsors, morale boosters, and equipment upgrades

Sponsors action square appears only when total business value >= $500k.
Offers 5 random brand deals per visit with signing bonus + monthly income
over a term; tracked in inv.sponsors and ticked monthly.

Manage Staff modal now exposes four morale boosters: pay bonuses, raise
wages, throw team parties, and training programs (also +4% rev boost
per employee). Each one costs money and lifts morale.

Each business now owns equipment with 5 tiers (Basic to State-of-the-art).
Equipment ages yearly. Old gear drags morale and revenue; upgrading
costs money, resets age, boosts rev, and bumps team morale. Employee
complaints about old equipment now only fire when gear is actually old,
and messages explicitly point the player to Manage Staff.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git -c http.version=HTTP/1.1 -c http.postBuffer=524288000 push origin master 2>&1 | tail -5

cd "C:\Users\noahm\Project" && git add bitlife-finance.html && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
finlife: sponsors button always visible next to Education (locked until $500k)

Previously hidden when locked; now sits permanently in the action grid
next to the Education button with a lock icon and disabled state. Shows
a tooltip explaining the $500k business value unlock.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git -c http.version=HTTP/1.1 -c http.postBuffer=524288000 push origin master 2>&1 | tail -3

cd "C:\Users\noahm\Project" && git add bitlife-finance.html && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
finlife: red-X close button + bounded modal with internal scroll

Modal box is now capped at 92vh and scrolls its choice list internally
instead of spilling off-screen. A red âœ• button pinned to the top-right
corner always exits the modal without scrolling to find a Close button.
On short viewports the max-width clamps to the height so the window
stays roughly square. Esc also closes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git -c http.version=HTTP/1.1 -c http.postBuffer=524288000 push origin master 2>&1 | tail -3

cd "C:\Users\noahm\Project" && git add bitlife-finance.html && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
finlife: add 16 athlete jobs under new 'sports' sector

Semi-pro athlete, MMA fighter, boxer, esports pro, swimmer, track,
olympian, tennis, golf, soccer, racing, baseball, hockey, NFL, NBA,
coach, athletic trainer. Salaries span $35k entry tier up to $10M
NBA-tier, with most requiring only high_school so the path opens
early in a run. Extended Provident Health CU and Prosperity Wealth
bank suits to include 'sports' so athletes get a fit recommendation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git -c http.version=HTTP/1.1 -c http.postBuffer=524288000 push origin master 2>&1 | tail -3
